name: Theory Table Lamp - 22 Inch Height - TBL4511 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the THEORY 22 inch black ceramic table lamp. Designed with a sleek profile, this lamp adds a touch of elegance to any room while providing warm ambient lighting. The textured ceramic base in sophisticated black complements modern and classic interiors alike. The sturdy iron construction ensures it stands elegantly on any tabletop or desk. Topping this stunning piece is a cotton shade that softens the light, creating a cozy atmosphere perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or workspaces. Enhance your decor with this stylish combination of simplicity and charm. Make the THEORY table lamp a centerpiece in your home today.
